title: Get in touch before you run
intro: Phase one uses static-safe contact options only: email links, location information and external links once approved. No server-side form is included.
contactIntro: Use the details below to check sessions, ask about joining, enquire about Couch to 5K or confirm Fenland 10 information.

formTodo: Future contact form functionality is intentionally not built in phase one. If requested later, add a privacy-reviewed form backend or external form link.
